FluxOptiFine
A performance-focused Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, built around Sodium, Lithium, and Iris. Includes 20+ optimization mods targeting FPS improvement, loading speed, and memory efficiency.
body:
## FluxOptiFine

A performance-focused Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, built around Sodium, Lithium, and Iris. Includes 20+ optimization mods targeting FPS improvement, loading speed, and memory efficiency.

### Technical Stack

| Category | Mods |
|----------|------|
| Rendering | Sodium, Indium, Sodium Extra, Iris |
| Game Logic | Lithium, C²M Engine |
| Memory | FerriteCore, ModernFix, Memory Leak Fix |
| Startup | LazyDFU, Smooth Boot |
| Culling | Entity Culling, More Culling, Cull Less Leaves |
| Utilities | Dynamic FPS, Debugify, Resolution Control |

### Requirements

- **Minimum**: i3, 8GB RAM, integrated graphics
- **Recommended**: i5, 16GB RAM, dedicated GPU

### Features

- Significant FPS improvement over vanilla
- Native shader support via Iris
- Reduced memory footprint
- Faster world loading
- Background FPS limiting when unfocused
